raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Mike Fong secured $29.4 million from the state budget for local investments.",
    "Funds include $25 million for the construction of a state of the art Community Center in Alhambra.",
    "The Community Center will include classrooms, fitness areas, multipurpose rooms, community meeting space, and exterior recreation areas.",
    "A total of $1.5 million will be allocated to the Asian Youth Center for empowering low-income, immigrant, and at-risk youth.",
    "$1.7 million will be allocated to the City of Alhambra for constructing a pocket park and upgrading existing parks with WiFi access, EV charging stations, and book hold lockers.",
    "$1 million will be provided to the Vincent Price Art Museum for a conservation lab, digitization lab, workspace, and ventilated storage.",
    "$200,000 will be allocated for the restoration of the La Laguna de San Gabriel Historic Playground."
  ]
}
```
